captions.instagram:
Honolulu, Hawaiʻi tide predictions for the week ahead.

The highest astronomical tide in this seven-day window is predicted at 2.14 ft above local MLLW at 2:19 PM on July 25, 2026. The lowest is 0.10 ft, a predicted range of 2.04 ft at NOAA station 1612340.

Times are station-local. Predictions are not observations or a flood forecast.

Open the full station chart at the link in bio.

Save this chart for coastal planning around Honolulu. Which Hawaiʻi coast station should Perigee cover next?

NOAA CO-OPS • Planning aid — not for navigation or a substitute for official advisories, local procedures, or operator judgment.
